resources.string: Enter your DNI and Email to verify your identity
A password reset email has been sent
Please enter your DNI or Email
The data does not match our records
This email is already linked to an account
Password must have at least 6 characters, 1 uppercase letter, and 1 special character

These Terms and Conditions govern the download, access, and use of the THE RING PRIVATE app (the App). By using the App, you expressly accept these conditions.

1. Purpose
The App is designed to manage member identification, share internal service notices, and improve access experience at the club. Use is personal and non-transferable.

2. User registration
To create an account, the user must provide real and valid information (name, surname, identity document, and email). The user is responsible for protecting their password and not sharing it.

3. Proper use
The user agrees to use the App lawfully and respectfully, in compliance with applicable regulations. It is forbidden to manipulate, copy, decompile, alter, or reuse the App content without express authorization.

4. Intellectual property
All intellectual and industrial property rights over the App, including design, text, trademarks, and graphic elements, belong to THE RING PRIVATE or authorized third parties.

5. Data protection
Personal data is processed in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable Spanish law. Processing is carried out to manage the membership relationship and App operation.

6. Availability and liability
THE RING PRIVATE may update, modify, or temporarily suspend the App for technical, legal, or maintenance reasons. While reasonable security measures are applied, uninterrupted availability cannot be guaranteed.

7. Account deletion
The user may request account deletion from Settings. This action removes access and associated data in enabled systems, except where legal retention obligations apply.

8. Applicable law
These conditions are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent courts of Madrid, unless mandatory legal provisions state otherwise.
Hello, I need help with the application.
Are you sure you want to exit the application?
How to become a member and pricing

How to become a member
1. Go to reception and request membership registration.
2. Complete and sign the registration form with valid personal details.
3. Explicitly accept the club internal rules.
4. Download the app and register with the same identity document.
5. First-time validation is completed in person at reception.

Active membership
Only users with a valid paid fee are considered active members. If the fee expires, membership is suspended until renewal.

Member benefits
- Faster access through QR identification.
- Personal account to manage notifications and settings.
- Locker usage according to club availability and conditions.
- Extra benefits during special events when announced.

Current prices
One-day member:
- Friday: 15 EUR
- Saturday: 15 EUR

VIP plans:
- VIP 1 month: 90 EUR
- VIP 6 months: 250 EUR

Prices may be updated. The current version is always available at reception and in the app.

1. Data controller
The data controller is THE RING PRIVATE.
Address: C. del Amparo, 75, Centro, 28012 Madrid.
Contact email: ringasociacion@gmail.com

2. Data processed
We process the data required to manage registration and member access: name, surname, email, and identity document.

3. Purpose
The main purpose is to manage membership, access to the club, and internal service communications.

4. Legal basis
Processing is based on user consent and the execution of the membership relationship.

5. Data retention
Data is retained while membership remains active or for the legal retention periods that apply.

6. User rights
You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction, and portability by contacting the provided email.

7. Security
We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to prevent unauthorized access, loss, or alteration of data.

8. Legal notice updates
This notice may be updated due to legal changes or service improvements. The current version is always available in the app.

Last updated: 17/04/2026

If you have an issue with the app, follow this order:

1. First, review the Frequently Asked Questions section.
2. If the issue continues, email ringasociacion@gmail.com including:
- Your account email
- Your registration ID number
- Device model
- Android version
- Exact error description

Support email:
ringasociacion@gmail.com

Official social media:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/theringprivate
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theringprivate

On-site support:
C. del Amparo, 75, Centro, 28012 Madrid

1. How do I register correctly?
Tap Sign Up, complete name, surname, ID, email, and a secure password. You must accept terms and conditions to finish.

2. Which documents are valid for registration?
Valid documents are DNI, NIE, or passport.

3. I forgot my password. What should I do?
On the sign-in screen, tap Forgot password and follow the email recovery steps.

4. My QR does not appear. How can I fix it?
Check your internet connection, close and reopen the QR screen, then try again. If needed, sign out and sign in again.

5. Can I update personal information?
Sensitive identity data is managed at reception for verification purposes.

6. How do I delete my account?
In Settings, open Delete account, verify your credentials, and confirm final deletion.

7. What happens to notifications if I delete one?
If you delete a notification in your profile, it is removed only for your account. Other users keep their own notifications independently.
Meeting on 04/22/2026 at 6:00 PM - Special Event

Welcome to THE RING PRIVATE. This guide explains each app section in a clear, step-by-step way.

1. REGISTRATION
1.1 Tap Sign Up on the first screen.
1.2 Enter name, surname, ID number, email, and password.
1.3 The password must include at least 6 characters, 1 uppercase letter, and 1 special character.
1.4 Check the terms and conditions box.
1.5 Tap Sign Up to create your account.

2. SIGN IN
2.1 Enter your email or ID and your password.
2.2 If you forgot your password, tap Forgot password and complete email recovery.

3. HOME SCREEN AND QR
3.1 From Home, tap the QR button to open your identification code.
3.2 The QR refreshes automatically and changes again each time you close and reopen it.
3.3 Show the QR at reception to identify your membership.

4. NOTIFICATIONS
4.1 In Home, you can review active club notices.
4.2 If you tap the X icon, that notice is removed only from your account.
4.3 New notices sent by administration will still appear.

5. PROFILE
5.1 In Profile, you can see your name, your email, and change your password.

6. SETTINGS
6.1 Change password: verify identity and update your access key.
6.2 Change language: switch between Spanish and English.
6.3 Appearance: switch between light and dark mode.
6.4 Legal information: open pricing, terms, legal notice, help, and FAQ.
6.5 User manual: open this guide inside the app.

7. SECURITY AND ACCOUNT
7.1 Log out: closes your active session on this device.
7.2 Delete account: removes your access and associated data after final confirmation. This action is irreversible.
7.3 Do not share your password or leave sessions open on shared devices.
